operator_notes: Homepage lists Weekly Bulletins — click the cloud download on this Sunday's row.
The PDF downloads automatically; the trainer records that download URL.
Harvester uses Pattern H: /files/10/Weekly-Bulletins/NNN/ increments each week.
Do not use image capture — this site serves a real PDF download.
do_not: Do not train on stoliverplunkett or other parish URLs.
Do not stop at click-only — recipe must end with a download step.
Do not use Pick bulletin image on this page.
